title: Crispy Bao Pork Buns
description: Soft and fluffy bao filled with tender pork and a sweet tangy sauce. A classic Chinese snack that's easy to make at home.

ingredients.name: Gooey sauce (soy sauce and brown sugar mix)

instructions: Preheat a frying pan with 2 tablespoons of oil over medium heat.
Add the pork and cook until browned and cooked through, about 5-7 minutes.
Assemble the bao by spreading a small amount of tangy sauce on each bun, followed by a few slices of pork.
Drizzle the gooey sauce over the pork.
Optional: pan-fry the assembled bao until crispy and golden brown.
Let rest for 2-3 minutes before slicing and serving.
You can also steam the bao instead of pan-frying for a softer texture.
Adjust the amount of tangy and gooey sauce to taste.
You can also add some chopped scallions or cilantro on top for extra flavor.
